commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds dynamic configured-model choices and an argument menu to the shared `/model` command registry, plus focused registry tests and a catalog display-name field.

PR surface: Source +27, Tests +35. Total +62 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: configure broader `models.providers` rows but a narrower `agents.defaults.models` allowlist, then the PR menu lists provider catalog rows while the existing `/model` switch path enforces `allowedModelKeys`. I did not run a live Slack workspace reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR is automerge-armed but still has an explicit human-review pause signal plus a compatibility finding; a maintainer should require the allowlist repair or intentionally accept the broader menu behavior.

target.title: feat: add model switch choices to /model
